These are all of the strict MV3 scales with three and four notes. Unconditional MV3 scales may have any L:M:s ratio. Conditional MV3 scales have a condition specified in the section header that the L:M:s ratio needs to satisfy in order for the scale to be strict MV3. Lines with two scales separated with a slash are lexicographically left and right chiral scales respectively, lines with only one scale are therefore achiral. All scales are written in their brightest mode.


== 3 Note Unconditional ==

'''1L 1M 1s:''' LsM / LMs


== 3 Note Conditional (MM=Ls) ==

(none)



== 4 Note Unconditional ==

(none)


== 4 Note Conditional (MM=Ls) ==

'''1L 2M 1s:''' LMMs / LsMM
